_comment: Copy to prompts.json and edit. 'prompts' = the buyer questions you want AI engines to cite you for. 'engines' maps a label to an OpenRouter model id. Slugs drift — verify at https://openrouter.ai/models. Perplexity 'sonar' searches the live web (best for GEO); plain chat models reflect training recall.
prompts: What are the best tools for <your category> in <your market>?
How do I choose a <your category> provider?
<your category> vs <adjacent category>: which should I use?
Who are the top companies offering <your service>?
What should I look for when buying <your product>?
